---
title: "ECLIPSE Lab — Presentations & Teaching"
description: "Lecture slides, conference talks, and course materials from the ECLIPSE Lab at FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg."
listing:
  - id: courses
    contents:
      - data_science_for_em/01_intro/docs/template.html
      - data_science_for_em/02_regression/docs/template.html
      - mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/01_learning_vs_data_analysis/01_intro/01_intro.html
    type: default
    fields: [title, description]
    template: listings.ejs
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .site-hero {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(59,130,246,0.18), rgba(139,92,246,0.14));
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    border-radius: 24px;
    padding: 2rem 2.5rem;
    margin: 2rem 0 3rem 0;
    text-align: left;
  }
  .site-hero h1 { color: #f8fafc; font-family: Outfit, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .site-hero p { color: #94a3b8; font-size: 1.05rem; }
  .course-card {
    background: rgba(20,25,40,0.65);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    border-radius: 18px;
    padding: 1.2rem 1.4rem;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    transition: border-color 0.2s;
  }
  .course-card:hover { border-color: rgba(59,130,246,0.5); }
  .course-card h3 { margin: 0 0 0.4rem 0; font-size: 1rem; }
  .course-card h3 a { color: #f8fafc; text-decoration: none; }
  .course-card h3 a:hover { color: #93c5fd; }
  .course-card p { color: #94a3b8; font-size: 0.88rem; margin: 0; }
  .course-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    background: rgba(59,130,246,0.2);
    border: 1px solid rgba(59,130,246,0.3);
    border-radius: 20px;
    padding: 0.15rem 0.6rem;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    color: #93c5fd;
    margin-top: 0.5rem;
  }
  .back-lab {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 3rem;
    padding-top: 2rem;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
  }
  .back-lab a { color: #94a3b8; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.9rem; }
  .back-lab a:hover { color: #93c5fd; }
</style>
```

:::{.site-hero}
### ECLIPSE Lab
## Presentations & Teaching Materials

Lecture slides, course decks, and conference presentations from the computational materials microscopy group at FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg.
:::

## Course Slides — Summer Semester 2026

:::{.course-card}
### Data Science for Electron Microscopy
Introduction to data science methods for electron microscopy — regression, classification, and dimensionality reduction applied to EM data.
[Open slides →](data_science_for_em/01_intro/docs/template.html)
[]{.course-badge} Lecture 01
:::

:::{.course-card}
### Regression & Model Fitting for EM Data
Regression methods and model fitting applied to spectroscopy, imaging, and diffraction data from electron microscopes.
[Open slides →](data_science_for_em/02_regression/docs/template.html)
[]{.course-badge} Lecture 02
:::

:::{.course-card}
### Mathematical Foundations of AI & ML
Foundations course covering the mathematical underpinnings of modern machine learning — linear algebra, probability, optimization, and neural network theory.
[Open slides →](mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/01_learning_vs_data_analysis/01_intro/01_intro.html)
[]{.course-badge} Lecture 01
:::

:::{.back-lab}
[← Back to ECLIPSE Lab](https://pelzlab.science)
:::
